items.title: Who would have thought back when Jimmy Butler went on his tirade that Andrew Wiggins and Karl-Anthony Towns would have NBA titles (and be the 2nd or 3rd best player on a championship team) and Butler would just have Finals losses on the resume?
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
Who would have thought back when Jimmy Butler went on his tirade that Andrew Wiggins and Karl-Anthony Towns would have NBA titles (and be the 2nd or 3rd best player on a championship team) and Butler would just have Finals losses on the resume?
Sports.

items.title: In the summer of 2018, the narrative spread about how soft KAT and Andrew Wiggins were after Jimmy Butler went to the media calling them out when he beat them with third-stringers during practice…
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
In the summer of 2018, the narrative spread about how soft KAT and Andrew Wiggins were after Jimmy Butler went to the media calling them out when he beat them with third-stringers during practice…

Wiggins won it all in 2022 and KAT is now 2 WINS away from a championship.

🤷‍♂️

#NBA
